search_candidates.title: Annual Report 2025 - Halma plc
search_candidates.content: # Annual Report 2025. **Annual Report and Accounts 2025**. The following films show how we put our purpose into action, helping our customers tackle some of the biggest challenges facing the world today. Download our Annual Report and Accounts 2025. The Annual Report and Accounts forms part of our 2025 reporting suite. "Our performance reflects the dedication of our people and the strength of our Sustainable Growth Model.". "Halma’s purpose remains at the heart of everything we do. "Agility and resilience are in our DNA, driving sustainable growth and empowering our leaders to navigate challenges and seize opportunities.". ## Our Sustainable Growth Model. Each of the elements of our Sustainable Growth Model create a self‑reinforcing system that gives us the resources and flexibility to address new opportunities and challenges. ### Halma's Sustainable Growth Model. You can access our previous Annual Report and Accounts from 2008 onwards in our archive. If you are looking for Annual Report and Accounts from before 2008, please contact us.
